title: Roasted Snappy Irish Corn Bowl
description: A hearty, roasted Irish dish featuring yellow masarepa and stone-bowl-dolsot, perfect for a post-workout meal. This vegetarian-friendly bowl is packed with nutrients and flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the yellow masarepa, salt, and pepper.
Add the olive oil to the masarepa mixture and stir until combined.
Add the Irish corn to the masarepa mixture and stir until the corn is evenly coated.
Transfer the corn mixture to the stone-bowl-dolsot.
Roast the corn mixture in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the stone-bowl-dolsot from the oven and top with cherry tomatoes and scallions.
Return the stone-bowl-dolsot to the oven and roast for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove the stone-bowl-dolsot from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
